rule CDB_BeatBanker_A_dualmode_Android_Trojan {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for BeatBanker: A dual‑mode Android Trojan"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-15"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "BeatBanker" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
